controller.prompt: If further adjustments are required, check the "Manually adjust the moving fragment" box. If not, stop here.

cb_step_1.title: Select CT Volume
cb_step_1.instruction: Choose the CT volume to process from the dropdown.

cb_step_2.title: Create Reference Segmentation
cb_step_2.instruction: In the Segment Editor, add a new segmentation and name it 'Reference_Segmentation'.

cb_step_3.title: Add and Name Reference Segment
cb_step_3.instruction: Click Add, rename segment to 'Reference_Segment', and set its color to Sage Green.

cb_step_4.title: Open Threshold Effect
cb_step_4.instruction: Click the Threshold button in Segment Editor.

cb_step_5.title: Set Threshold Range
cb_step_5.instruction: Adjust the slider to set the desired bone threshold range.

cb_step_6.title: Apply Threshold
cb_step_6.instruction: Click Apply to run the threshold.

cb_step_8.title: Select Keep Selected Island
cb_step_8.instruction: Choose 'Keep selected island' from the Islands options.

cb_step_9.title: Select Reference Part
cb_step_9.instruction: Click the reference bone fragment in a slice view to keep it.

cb_step_10.title: Create Moving Segmentation
cb_step_10.instruction: In Segment Editor, add a new segmentation named 'Moving_Segmentation'.

cb_step_11.title: Add and Name Moving Segment
cb_step_11.instruction: Click Add, rename segment to 'Moving_Segment', set color to Cyan.

cb_step_13.title: Set Threshold Range (Moving)
cb_step_13.instruction: Adjust the slider to set the moving bone threshold range (default from previous threshold).

cb_step_17.title: Select Moving Part
cb_step_17.instruction: Click the moving bone fragment in a slice view to keep it.

cb_step_18.title: Select Reference Segmentation
cb_step_18.instruction: Choose the 'Reference_Segmentation' node from the dropdown.

cb_step_19.title: 3D Reconstruction (Reference)
cb_step_19.instruction: Click the '3D Reconstruction (reference)' button to generate the 3D model.

cb_step_20.title: Select Moving Segmentation
cb_step_20.instruction: Choose the 'Moving_Segmentation' node from the dropdown.

cb_step_24.title: Adjust View for Alignment
cb_step_24.instruction: Rotate and zoom the 3D view to a clear angle to manually align the moving fragment.

cb_step_26.title: Manual Adjustment Needed?
cb_step_26.instruction: If further adjustments are required, choose Yes. Otherwise, choose No to finish.

cb_step_27.title: Adjust Moving Fragment View
cb_step_27.instruction: Rotate and zoom the 3D view to manually adjust the moving fragment's position.

cb_step_28.title: Harden Transform
cb_step_28.instruction: Click the 'Harden transform into moving fragment' button to finalize the transform.

Add and rename Reference_Segment with Sage Green color
Activate Threshold effect in Segment Editor
Apply Threshold effect

Create a new segmentation named Moving_Segmentation

In the 2D view, click to select the moving part.
In the 2D view, click to select the moving part.

Detect fracture surfaces
Initialize registration
Manually adjust the rotation and displacement of the moving part.
Perform reduction planning
Manually adjust the moving fragment.
Harden transform into moving fragment
